review_body: I have never bought a mattress online before. I wasn't sure how it would arrive. But it was rolled in a tube and packed in a way that I could move the box myself. It was easy to remove the packaging and had clear instructions on how to unwrap the mattress and let it reach its full state.

Was looking for something affordable that wasn't just some cheap mattress for my child's room. Delivered a day early, it is a spring mattress, took about two days for the foam part to fully decompress from being packed inside of a box. I was a little intimidated, but it was no hassle, easy to unbox and pretty comfy for snuggles
The only thing I would recommend is that Walmart use another service other than OnTrac for delivery. Waited all day for delivery and it wasn't delivered until 7:30 PM.

I absolutely love this bed. I would recommend this to anyone I have Arthritis stenosis lumbar and cervical and suffer tremendously. I normally sleep in a recliner and I ordered this bed. And moved into a new apartment. Put it together myself and I love it. I will tell everyone I know they need this bed. Thank you very much for providing this for me.

Zinus makes it easy for me and my SHP team to tackle child bedlessness in our region robustly. We would not be making the same impact if it were not for their competitive pricing, which empowers me and my SHP team to solve this problem, regardless of the circumstances.

this is the classic bed that I've been looking for forever with more springs for body support rather than a whole bunch of foam and bedding. this is the classic kind that they make back in the '90s.. It's so freaking comfortable and it's supporting my back so good.

I'm not sure if this is the correct size. It inflated quickly once taken out of the box. I'm not sure of whether or not I'm supposed to take the plastic off as a requirement for full inflation, or if leaving it on is fine. Also not sure of how long to allow it to inflate, I don't see any instructions. I'm considering a return but I suppose I'll give it a couple of hours before I truly decide. The mattress feels firm, decent. Too soon to tell… I will update this post soon!

This mattress looks nice in the picture but it disappoints in real life. Looks and feels cheap and uncomfortable. You can definitely feel the springs. It's basically an oversized crib mattress and it doesn't fully fit the bed frame. I was disappointed when I saw it.

I am a side sleeper with a bad back and carpal tunnel so a firm mattress is mandatory for me. The mattress is as advertised, well made, and firm. However, as advertised, it is basic and therefore has no cushion. I couldnt feel the springs and didn't have numb hips when I woke up, but my body felt sore. I just wanted to warn anyone before buying this for yourself or worse, a child because a comfortable, good night's rest is super important. I also personally would feel embarrassed by carrying a mattress into the store to return it because its been opened already. BACK STORY: I've slept on a Slumber1 by Zinus 8" mattress for the past several years and I figured it was time to replace it because it was damaged during a move. It was a VERY comfortable medium-firm mattress (I loved it). When I checked Walmart's website I noticed they are only 6" now so I opted to purchase the basic mattress to give it a try because it was firm. Anyhow, no luck with that one so I've ordered their Euro-top 10" mattress even though it is medium firmness. I hope that one is better.

If I could give it zero I would!! A piece of trash but for some reason my dog likes it to lay on for naps only. Even he knows it's not good for anything more than that.. i have two other Zinus mattresses, king and queen, wonderful! I was using this one for a daybed, can't even sit on it and be comfortable! Put it in my dog's room to lay around on, but he still prefers the other beds to lay on more! Waste of money!

Walmart's service was AWFUL. The mattress is extraordinarily uncomfortable, and when I tried to return it, Walmart cancelled the return pickup 5 times. Last time I tried, they told me pick up was never available and , if I wanted a return, I needed to drop off the product myself. Extremely unproffessional behaviour.

review_title: Mattress is okay for a child
review_body: Had to buy an "emergency" twin mattress for a guest that would have ruined the more pricey, Serta medium-firm, I had on the bed (due to being a heavy smoker). So I quickly ordered this budget mattress for under $100.00. I had no intention of saving/keeping this mattress after the guest left, because it would smell of cigarette smoke. That having been said, this mattress is definitely designed for a child. Anyone weighing more than 100 Lbs. will feel the springs and sleep uncomfortably. Unless this is a purchase for a child--spend a bit more and get a better mattress. Thank you for reading my review.

The bed is very comfortable. My daughter loves it and she sleeps a lot better than she did on her other bed. This product is definitely worth the money and it's a reasonable price. The mattress is very comfortable in my opinion and I would recommend to buy this.L the bed is very comfortable. My daughter loves it and she sleeps a lot better than she did on her other bed. This product is definitely worth the money and it's a reasonable price. The mattress is very comfortable in my opinion and I would recommend to buy it! I'm highly satisfied with my purchase! I'm highly satisfied with my purchase!

review_title: damaged and/defective. had to throw out in 2 days.
review_body: I always try to write a positive review. The coils/springs were going in different directions and it was damaged. i couldn't sleep on it. very uncomfortable I really like the Zinus brand and have been using only Zinus for all of our mattresses for nearly a decade. Unfortunately, I had to toss it within a couple days. I had to take a huge loss on this one.

review_title: Good sleep is on the way!
review_body: It's been over a year since my bones have slept on coils. Having moved around some, of late, my bedding options have changed quite a bit. Now I am back to a solid box springs with an inner spring coil mattress plus a 2 inch memory foam topper to boot. The combination works for me and my body is grateful. I didn't realize that good sleep was missed, but now I know I can get the sleep my body craves and deserves.

These two mattresses were so uncomfortable that we returned them to our local store per specific email instructions from Walmart.com, only to have Walmart refuse to refund. Multiple calls with promise to resolve and multiple store visits, but no resolution. Store claims it has no way to communicate with anyone at corporate at a higher level than I was able to reach at the call center. Incredibly frustrating and unprofessional customer service experience. I will not be renewing my Walmart membership or shopping at Walmart again!

We bought it for my son's dorm. The mattress was at good price, but lacks support to the back. The mattress sinks as soon as I sit on it and I'm only around 100 pounds. I would like to return it but it requests to be taken to the store or repack it for free pick up. It's not possible for us to repack this mattress because it came in a tightly bundled roll and spread to full size after we opened the package. Now we are stuck with this one and need to think about how we can dispose it.

review_title: caused chemical burns, can't with a hole in seam
review_body: after opening the vacuum sealing there was a hole on the bottom side close to the stitching in the corner. we figured a sheet would cover it . my daughter sleep on this bed and ended up with a horrible rash. doctor said chemical burn. we assumed maybe it was her skin, shes sensitive. so we trade the brand new mattress for her with her brothers used one. neither ended up with the same rash the next morning, except on his face. his eyes were swollen shut.Walmart won't refund it without it being sent back, no problem there is a health hazard for us at this point, but it came vacuumed sealed, how an i suppose to return this mattress with no vehicle ? then they offered to just leave it outside as is and shipping drivers will come for it.I live in a suburb with an HOA and they would never allow me to place a mattress on my porch for 24-48 hours. so I'm just going to end up tossing it. definitely don't get for your younger ones!

I was excited to guess this matches thinking that it was better than the one that I bought from home plus years ago. I'm actually glad I didn't throw away my home plus mattresses. Because this mattress does not work for me at all. I let my granddaughter because she's a much younger and smaller person than I am and she told me grandma I can feel the springs and the mattress. This is not going to be a good mattress for you. I guess you get what you pay for it was around $100 and I got a less value than a $100 mattress.

Bought this smashes for my mom and ended up putting it in the upstairs storage because you could feel springs all over the place as soon as you sit down it's not thick. You feel every metal spring when you sit or lay on it. It's very uncomfortable no support whatsoever. Maybe that's why it was so cheap.

Bought this for my son‘s twin bed. We bought him the Batmobile bedframe, so the bed would be on the floor. And now, so is he. The second you put a pound of pressure on this mattress flattened to the ground. You can feel every single spring. Except for the springs, and the outer layer I'm not sure there's any substance to this mattress. DO NOT BUY THIS TO SAVE MONEY.

Maybe it's bc adults are naturally heavier , but I do not like this mattress. I got two for my kiddos who are not even 50 lbs. they're both under. They haven't complained about them. But when I laid on one , I felt me hand almost ripped through. That's how “thin” it felt.

review_title: Stop ! You get what you pay for DONT BUY
review_body: Terrible mattress. Super thin with little to no support. You can feel the inner springs through the fabric. Less than 100 lbs and you can literally hit the box spring when you sit down We are having to replace it not 5 months later. Fine for display only do not waste your money.

It took longer than expected. It kept rescheduling delivery and was off by a few days, which threw off my assembly schedule and I still haven't gotten that worked out yet they keep bringing out one person, but tell me that two is needed, and they are having to reschedule so it has been an inconvenience.

This is the 2nd one I purchased and I'm very displeased. I thought the problem was in the bed itself but the mattress 'broke down' on the edge after just a few weeks giving me back problems. The break down is where I set down to swing my legs up on the bed.

For the price it's ok! 😏If your out of options BUT,... 🤨If your idea was firmness or comfort forget about it! 🫤 The top layer may as well be paper. Yup that thin! you feel (and by the pics) See every spring!... and hear too!, 😐Which you know....helps for sleeping...! 🧐My Advice: Spend a few more bucks and get something better. Zinus really dropped the balls in these last few yrs. ☹️Shame!

Mattress arrived rolled in box. I unpacked it and let it lay on bed foundation for 3 nights as directed. And then…… Mattress completely collapes when I set on it. Not med-firm as stated. It does not meet the weight as described. This was a bad purchase for me to make, however I am sleeping on it as I have nothing else to sleep on. Therefore I will keep it until I can get another.

I purchased this mattress for my toddler's bunk bed %26 it is so comfortable! I was a little nervous due to some of the reviews but it was worth every penny. It was super easy to set up, just take it out the box %26 let it lay flat until it takes shape. It's so comfortable I've even slept on the mattress misled. If you're second guessing about purchasing it, don't! It's comfort %26 sturdiness all for a good price.

Two months ago, I requested a refund from Walmart, but I still haven't received it. The customer service experience was frustrating - they passed the blame around, and despite calling multiple times, I was told that my request wasn't escalated as claimed. Buyer beware: Walmart's refund process is a nightmare. Avoid ordering from them if you can.

Even after letting it sit for 38 hours it was significantly deformed. One side completely collapses when you put any pressure on it and the whole mattress has a wave to it. Terrible product. Buying mattresses online is already skeptical and products like these are exactly why.

Worst mattress ever. Bought the 6 inch mattress to put on my daybed. The springs were terrible and felt like you were on an awful air mattress as soon as someone else sat down. No padding whatsoever. Had to transport and bring to a Walmart store for return. Do not waste your time with this mattress.

It's very uncomfortable, took too long to ship, not worth the money, coils can be felt through top of the mattress %26 it doesn't fit in the twin XL bed frame l purchased from a competitor of Walmart since I couldn't find a single bed frame my daughter %26 I wanted to have delivered same or next day. Now I can't return it because it's been taken out of the vacuum seal so I'll just have to take the loss and purchase another mattress from somewhere else. Thanks for nothing Walmart
I bought this mattress for my grandson , it is very thin and you can feel the springs in it , definitely would not ever buy this again or recommend this to anyone either!!!

If it's something that I had wanted to buy I would have, unfortunately it's not something that I needed and wanted. I think it's just the right thing that I would have wanted . It's perfect. It's also looks like it's a well made product
This mattress was worth the price just let a responsible person open it my 21 year old daughter was almost knocked over when she cut into it. My son loves the comfort.
Every movement felt the inner springs. Had to buy mattresses topper. Had I known that I would have purchased a different one. I would not recommend this mattress.

it is a nice mattress that gets the job done, it came about a day late but that was due to the weather. if you are lookong for a cheap twin size mattress that will still give you a goodnights rest then this is the way to go!
I was amazed for the price really good quality the stitching around the the mattress is done with double stitching. I feel like for heavier person purchase the mattress pad as well for extra padding.

I'm very grateful for the bed but this is not up to standard for the price. The springs are so hard, the bed is very flimsy and thin. I'm going to have to buy a mattress topper for this. But the size is good.

Not cheap and flimsy! Great buy, beautiful look, comfortable. In a temporary situation where I needed a twin size bed. It's really helping my lower back, feeling great getting it back on track!! Not bad at all for $60

When I took the mattress out of the box, I was very pleased. Within a few weeks it had flattened permanently in the center. It is like a one inch foam pad

was the worst mattress i ever slept on. mattress was to thin and never completely filled out.material was loose on mattress. mattress had too much movement. itwas the worst. I had to purchase another mattress it was a waist of my money.

Bought these for grandchildren and their new bunk beds at Grammy and Papa's house. They love them, sleep well and are ready to come back. They pop open out of the box easily, and are full size in a day.

bed was all but ready when taken out of box children like them for the bunkbeds good value for money elsewhere $15 $20 more plus shipping was free for this items it was a bed in box but was easy box was heavy thou.
The matress is comfortable. The only problem was that the unwrapping instructions were wrapped inside. I had to completely unwrap it to get the unwrapping instructions. They were funny, though.
The matress is comfortable. The only problem was that the unwrapping instructions were wrapped inside. I had to completely unwrap it to get the unwrapping instructions. They were funny, though.

I like that the size is bigger than what I thought it would be and that it's a nice fit for my little cousin and her room.She says it's very comfortable.

For the price we paid, we were surprised at how comfortable the mattress was. We have a full bed with a really outdated mattress. We did not want to spend hundreds on a set when the bed is only slept on a couple times a year.

I'm very grateful for the bed but this is not up to standard for the price. The springs are so hard, the bed is very flimsy and thin. I'm going to have to buy a mattress topper for this. But the size is good.
Finally a good firm supportive mattress. First descent sleep in a long time. Amazing how it comes shrink wrapped, then snaps right to full size. Better than I expected. Thank you !
This mattress has no comfort at all, all you feel are springs in your back, hips, etc. I will never buy another mattress or mattress topper from Walmart
Very thin with little support. Springs pushed right through the material. My seven year old only laid on it for a minute, it instantly went flat and he complained that it poked him.

was the worst mattress i ever slept on. mattress was to thin and never completely filled out.material was loose on mattress. mattress had too much movement. itwas the worst. I had to purchase another mattress it was a waist of my money.

review_title: Not firm as it says in description
review_body: Not firm at all it's medium to soft , I have return it. But returned process was very smooth and no hassle. Thanks Walmart for great customer service
I was amazed for the price really good quality the stitching around the the mattress is done with double stitching. I feel like for heavier person purchase the mattress pad as well for extra padding.

We got this for daughter for her floor bed and it is comfy I would wait 2 to maybe 3 days before laying on it to make sure it completely fills out like it needs to. Other than that it's a nice mattress

We got this for daughter for her floor bed and it is comfy I would wait 2 to maybe 3 days before laying on it to make sure it completely fills out like it needs to. Other than that it's a nice mattress

I opened the box removed the mattress and put it on the floor and cut off all the plastic so I could expand. I let it set there for 48 hours and it still was not totally expanded. I got the 6 inch and it only expanded to 4 1/2 inches.

this is the worst bed ive ever purchased. i got it for my toddler and even he couldnt sleep on it. you feel every single spring. we set it on the floor and as soon as you lay on it you touch the ground. it has zero support

Worst Experience Ever. The incompetence of Walmart employees was mind boggling. Walmart chose no responsibility of the lost merchandise and even advised me that I should walk around the neighborhood to see if I could find out if it was delivered to wrong address?? That is illegal and a crime in California. You can't go onto someone else's property without permission and take items that you think are yours! Walmart even has that on their own website that it's okay to do it without consent, I guess they're taking responsibility if a neighbor believes you're a porch pirate and protects what he believes is right. No wonder Walmart has so many open lawsuits against the company. They just don't care about the safety and efficacy of their customers. Please post this, although nothing will change

Imagine my delight when I discovered that Walmart carries Zinus mattresses at an unbelievably low price point. As a DV victim turned thriver, this will is the first mattress in my life that hadn't been urinated on by an alcoholic. It's the best sleep I've ever had but also my two dogs and two cats as well. Highly recommend Zinus 10/10
Can feel the spring through the mattress when laying on it. Bought for our 4 year old and she doesn't care, but not comfortable for normal size adults.
bed there's barely any padding to cover the springs. you can feel every spring. It looks nice and as well stitched but very uncomfortable would not recommend.
I ordered this mattress for my daughter. It arrived in a timely manner and was as advertised. It recovered well from being "boxed" and she says it is comfortable. Well worth the money.

Mattresses are lightweight, but sturdy. They are easy to unpack and handle. We've slept on them two nights now and they're very comfortable. Great for an easy sleeping arrangement for kids or small spaces.
Very soft, doesn't seem to be of good quality, but it will be used as a bed under a trundle bed, only to be used a few times, by a child, an adult wouldn't sleep well on it.

I have still not received my package. Being delayed for two days for a big mattress, I know things could happen along the way. But I did need this mattress on the first delivery time as it is a need that was important, along with the twin mattress I ordered together and expected both to arrive at the same day.

review_title: awesome product 3rd party delivery service sucks!
review_body: The item itself is perfect and just what I wanted however Walmart uses Lasership for a 3rd party delivery service and they suck! Package was delivered yesterday afternoon and today I finally found out. It was delivered to the wrong address, this isnt the 1st time this has happened. i plan on stopping orders from Walmart until they find another delivery service.. I should not have to waste my time and gas to track down my own package...

review_title: mattress was good delivery was terrible
review_body: the mattress was good the delivery supposed to come Friday (fed-ex) didn't get until Sunday needed cause my 84 yr old dad moved in on that Friday he had no mattress for his bed 2 days and that was very much a problem him trying to sleep on the couch 😑

This is being sold as a mattresss its false. If I accidently reported your review my apologies... Somehow I see this as a joke someone sitting back laughing at all the dumb folks that fell for this. Jokes on you! Do the world a favor and please dont waste our time.

They have a lot of big talk about how amazing this product is but most companies do it's better than sleeping on an air mattress but honestly it's probably better to use as a dog bed if you have large dogs lol or use it as a camping mattress in a trailer or the back of a truck or suv just save up and buy a better mattress honestly

It is 3 inches! Not six! I can feel the springs with my hand. A good enough mattress topper will be another $50… I got an actual 6” firm sinus mattress on Amazon 5 months ago for $20 more that was VERY NICE! I regret buying this. I did t realize til it arrived that I didn't buy they same as last time! I meant to but the nice one again that I got from Amazon! This mattress folds so easily. If you sit on the edge the springs flatten to nothing! Don't but this if you like firm mattress!

This mattress is not what it's supposed to be the quality is ridiculously horrible. . It's barely 4 inches tall. It came rolled up in a box dirty. You can feel the springs on both sides. Walmart should not continue to sell this product. Inferior doesn't even describe the quality of this product.

It's okay for maybe a little child however I purchased 2 of these for a daybed and trundle. You can hear the springs when you sit on it feels as if they're about to pop any second. Wasn't worth $70.00 at best $40. I'll definitely need to replace these in the near future.

This mattress is pretty uncomfortable, I can feel the springs and when I sit on the bed, I can feel the bars of the bedframe, I would suggest a mattress topper, but I don't even know if that would help. I'm laying on my stomach on it, and I can feel the springs in my ribs.

i almost didnt buy this after reading some od the reviews..but i got it anyway...pretty decent for the price. i got this for my 9 year old. he loves it and its just like the picture. it's worth the money. i would buy this again when my other kids get older

Amazing purchase! Very happy with how fast they were delivered %26 quality of the mattresses Bought a full size %26 a twin for my son. Both came in a box undamaged %26 in great shape. Very comfortable to sleep on would deff but again if needing a mattress, great price too!

review_title: Should not be called a mattress.
review_body: It is not a mattress. It is more like an uncomfortable mattress pad. You can feel the inside spirals with very little pressure. My 90 lb daughter sat on it and was instantly sitting on the floor. Like sitting on an air mattress that does not have enough air. Worth the money.

review_title: An overpriced SCAM. Save your $$ and your back
review_body: I went into this knowing a mattress in a box would be thin, but this is MAYBE 3 inches tall, and lacks so much support, I might as well sleep on the ground with a blanket under me. The $15 air mattress I got from Walmart feels like heaven compared to this. I never thought I'd miss my old dorm room mattress, but boy do I. For $60 this is an absolute piece of trash. A complete scam. I wouldn't even donate it, I'd feel bad for anyone who had to sleep on it. Maybe a kid could use it, but there's so little support! I couldn't tell you what the springs are there for, but I can definitely feel them. Absolutely refund worthy, this thing wasn't worth half of what I paid for it. SERIOUSLY, stick with the air mattress. I'm willing to fight tooth and nail for a refund for this thing, I have no idea what I'm supposed to do with it, it's SO uncomfortable. A dog bed?

very uncomfortable. its made so cheap that you can literally feel the springs without barely having to apply any pressure so imagine laying on it. i have a very thick mattress topper so it does help somewhat. even with having a thick mattress cover; i wouldn't recommend
It's too springy. Top cushion layer is not good. I feel like I am directly sleeping on springs. Getting back pain after using this bed.
Bed came in a long box. i am somewhat physically limited, but I didn't have any problems getting it set up alone.
This mattress is very comfortable and the value was great. I'm glad that it can stand alone without a box spring. I highly recommend.

review_title: OK if you're not too heavy.
review_body: This is not made for a "grown" adult. Would be fine for a lightweight maybe 130lbs. Length is good, just not enough support.
If you like being able to feel %26 hear the springs with every move this mattress is for you! The most uncomfortable mattress I have ever laid on.
I needed a full mattress for my granddaughter. This was price affordable and delivery was quick. Very satisfied.
Not a bad matterss at all but it is a little springy in my opinion. My son doesn't seem to mind it at all tho.
The price is good, but the firmness and the thickness of the mattress is not too good, but it does serve purpose.
It fit great and in the area for my son going to last him a good while fits perfectly on a twin size frame
BEEN USING THE FOAM TOPPERS, AND THEY DON'T DO MUCH, SO I DECIDED TO TRY THIS ONE. SO FAR IT FEELS GOOD.
Not the best quality, you can feel the inner springs. It's a lot heavier than expected. They're so flimsy it makes it difficult to move around.
Hurts my shoulders and will need to get mattress pads to make it sleep worthy. Worst mattress I've ever experienced
It was a nice bed for my teenage daughter and she loves her new bed. And it was priced within my budget for a bed
Its good for the price bulbs definitely made for kids. I would like for it to be more firm but I bought it for my kids and they love it
I would not recommend this mattress. Bought for my daughter's room and it was awful. Very thin, you could fold it in half
Came early in the morning which i love ! Its bot exactly like the picture but its nice i may have to give it time to gully expand .
The product was thinner than expected it squeaks when getting in out of it. I bought for my 9-year-old, and he says it is uncomfortable.
The product is awesome. But the price could have been lower. The price got lower a day after I bought the mattress by a few dollars.
If you want to feel wire while you're laying on it then get this bed of course it was cheap so you get what you pay for
IF YOU DONT HAVE BOXSPRING DONT BUY IT . IT ADVERTISED U DONT NEED A BOX SPRING IT WILL BE FINE.IF YOU LIKE SLEEING ON THE FLOOR
this was supposed to be an 8 inch matress, and it is only exactly 7 inches thick also you can feel all the springs through the very thin top fabric
Perfect for the price. If you're in tight time and need a mattress fast, this is great and doesn't need a topper.
it's the most uncomfortable as bed there is it sucks if I could get it back in the box I would return it
So comfortable, perfect size, hight quality, very fast shipping and delivery, highly recommend l to everyone
The quality of the mattress was not how it said it was.. You could have feel the hard wires of the mattress it was not comfortable at all
the mattress was long enough but they way it sounded on here that it was firm its softer that a toddler mattress.
Good value but deceptive description. Too much springiness in the mattress. Not enough cushion for comfort. Purchased as a necessity and on a budget.
could feel the springs not very comfortable but was inexpensive to begin with had to purchase a mattress topper to be comfortable
By itself the mattress is not comfortable. In addition I bought a mattress topper and foam mattress. Sleeps really good with additional padding.
Springs can be felt through mattress. May be good for a small child but not an adult. A foam topper is recommended.
Like I said previously, the service was awful. The product is wonderful and the price is great, but service *****.
the worst mattress I have ever slept on in my life my husband's back's hurting my hips are hurting just a terrible all around mattress
Springs can be felt through mattress. May be good for a small child but not an adult. A foam topper is recommended.
It was a nice bed for my teenage daughter and she loves her new bed. And it was priced within my budget for a bed
Not for toddlers… Spring are firm but kids would not love the hardness of the mattress. Needs some more sponge over the springs.
Very uncomfortable. You can feel all of the springs. Bought it for my toddlers and they would rather sleep on my bed.

review_title: Don't buy large items from Walmart.
review_body: Mattress hard as a rock. Walmart does not honor their return policy. Don't by any large items from them. Their delivery and pickup are very unprofessional. Very disappointed.

I thought the mattress would be made of foam and not springs. The instructions say to leave it for 48 hours for it to reach its maximum capacity. Since I opened it, it has stayed that way and has not grown any further.

I rated the product this way because it met my expectations for quality and performance. It was as described, worked as intended, and provided good value for the price. Overall, I am satisfied with the purchase.
This is not a comfortable mattress. It doesn't look nearly as plush on top, fully inflated even with the time passed. But it is very firm. You can feel where the springs are.
